original_query: select o_orderpriority, count(*) as order_count from orders where o_orderdate >= date '1994-02-01' and o_orderdate < date '1994-02-01' + interval '3' month and exists ( select * from lineitem where l_orderkey = o_orderkey and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate ) group by o_orderpriority order by o_orderpriority;
rewritten_query: select o_orderpriority, count(*) as order_count from orders where o_orderdate >= date '1994-02-01' and o_orderdate < date '1994-02-01' + interval '3' month and exists ( select * from lineitem where l_orderkey = o_orderkey and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate ) group by o_orderpriority order by o_orderpriority;
